commit_message:
Bug fix for KU15P's MPS PGP 5Gb/s Bug fix for KU15P's MPS PGP 5Gb/s ### Description
- Bug fix for KU15P's MPS PGP 5Gb/s 

### Note
- In AMC carrier Gen1, a common GT refClk was mapped to BANK226 such that all the GTH QUAD could use the same refClk for GT and 250 MHz generation
- In AMC carrier Gen2, the GT clock reference where rearrange for optimal SMURF performance. This means that there is not a common GT refClk that can be use for all the MPS Central Node GTs.  The work around is to use
